sentences.arabic: زُرْتُ مَدِينَةَ الْقَاهِرَةِ الْأُسْبُوعَ الْمَاضِيَ مَعَ عَائِلَتِي.
sentences.translation: Prošle sedmice sam sa porodicom posjetio Kairo.
sentences.translationEn: I visited Cairo last week with my family.

sentences.arabic: شَاهَدْنَا الْأَهْرَامَاتِ الْعَظِيمَةَ وَالْتَقَطْنَا صُوَرًا جَمِيلَةً.
sentences.translation: Vidjeli smo velike piramide i napravili lijepe fotografije.
sentences.translationEn: We saw the Great Pyramids and took beautiful pictures.

sentences.arabic: الْمَكَانُ كَانَ مُزْدَحِمًا بِالسُّيَّاحِ مِنْ كُلِّ مَكَانٍ.
sentences.translation: Mjesto je bilo puno turista iz cijelog svijeta.
sentences.translationEn: The place was crowded with tourists from everywhere.

sentences.arabic: اشْتَرَيْتُ بَعْضَ الْهَدَايَا التَّذْكَارِيَّةِ مِنَ السُّوقِ الْقَدِيمِ.
sentences.translation: Kupio sam neke suvenire na staroj pijaci.
sentences.translationEn: I bought some souvenirs from the old market.

sentences.arabic: كَانَتْ رِحْلَةً رَائِعَةً لَنْ أَنْسَاهَا أَبَدًا.
sentences.translation: Bilo je to predivno putovanje koje nikada neću zaboraviti.
sentences.translationEn: It was a wonderful trip that I will never forget.
